message:
fix: preserve all hooks when overriding core.hooksPath, not just managed ones

When beads redirects core.hooksPath, preserve all user hooks from the
original hooks directory (not just the ones beads manages). Skip
directories, dotfiles, and .sample files. Fixes hook loss for non-managed
hooks like commit-msg, pre-rebase, etc.

PR: #2738

Co-Authored-By: Gissur Simonarson <gzur@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
